column1: # Live-detection probe site list.
# Tab-separated columns:
#   name        slug used for the per-site artifact directory
#   url         page to navigate to
#   wait_for    "selector" (waitFor selector) or "load" (skip wait)
#   selector    CSS/XPath used both as waitSelector (when wait_for=selector)
#               and as the text-extract selector. "-" to skip text extract
#               and fall back to the full-page body text.
#   notes       free-form description, displayed in report.md
# Lines starting with '#' or empty are ignored.
# NOTE on omitted sites:
#   * reCAPTCHA v3 — requires our own site key and an iframe-aware harness;
#     keep a placeholder until P6 follow-up.
# Extend by appending a new row. Selectors should target a small, stable
# element whose innerText carries the detection verdict.
browserscan
fingerprintjs-demo
